## [15:11 - 17:21]

I know the outcome. I know the purpose and I look for leverage. Leverage is different than delegation. What's problem with delegation delegation is you have all that needs to be done. So you give it to someone else and you tell them it needs to be done. And when they don't do it, you're pissed off. Leverage says I can move the biggest boulder in the world with a little bit of effort if I get something I can do it with, but I'm still part of it. So leverage is if I'm going to leverage something here with Tom, I'm going to make sure Tom understands the what the outcome.
